queries.name: Get Student Graduation Date
queries.description: Query to get graduation date for a given pidm.

queries.name: Get Graduating Students
queries.description: Query to get students graduating in a given term.

columns.name: SHRDGMR_PIDM
columns.description: Internal identification number of the person

columns.name: SHRDGMR_SEQ_NO
columns.description: Degree Sequence Number. Number assigned to each degree student has.

columns.name: SHRDGMR_DEGC_CODE
columns.description: Degree Code. Students degree code (BS, BA, etc.).

columns.name: SHRDGMR_DEGS_CODE
columns.description: Degree Status Code. Status of students degree, for example sought, awarded, etc.

columns.name: SHRDGMR_LEVL_CODE
columns.description: Degree Level Code. Level to which degree applies (undergraduate, graduate, etc).

columns.name: SHRDGMR_COLL_CODE_1
columns.description: Degree College Code 1. College offering the degree.

columns.name: SHRDGMR_MAJR_CODE_1
columns.description: Degree Major Code 1. First major associated with the degree.

columns.name: SHRDGMR_MAJR_CODE_MINR_1
columns.description: Degree Minor Code 1. First minor associated with the degree.

columns.name: SHRDGMR_MAJR_CODE_CONC_1
columns.description: Degree Concentration Code 1. First concentration associated with the degree.

columns.name: SHRDGMR_COLL_CODE_2
columns.description: Degree College Code Secondary. Secondary college offering the degree.

columns.name: SHRDGMR_MAJR_CODE_2
columns.description: Degree Major Code 1 Secondary. First major for the secondary curriculum associated with the degree.

columns.name: SHRDGMR_MAJR_CODE_MINR_2
columns.description: Degree Minor Code 1 Secondary. First minor for the secondary curriculum associated with the degree.

columns.name: SHRDGMR_MAJR_CODE_CONC_2
columns.description: Degree Concentration Code 1 Secondary. First concentration for the secondary curriculum associated with the degree.

columns.name: SHRDGMR_APPL_DATE
columns.description: Degee Application Date. Date of degree application. Defaults to current date on entry of degree.

columns.name: SHRDGMR_GRAD_DATE
columns.description: Graduation Date. Graduation date of student.

columns.name: SHRDGMR_ACYR_CODE_BULLETIN
columns.description: Degree Bulletin Year. Year of bulletin or catalog under which degree is being offered.

columns.name: SHRDGMR_ACTIVITY_DATE
columns.description: Activity Date. Specifies the date record was created or updated.

columns.name: SHRDGMR_MAJR_CODE_MINR_1_2
columns.description: Degree Minor Code 2. Second minor associated with the degree.

columns.name: SHRDGMR_MAJR_CODE_CONC_1_2
columns.description: Degree Concentration Code 2. Second concentration associated with the degree.

columns.name: SHRDGMR_MAJR_CODE_CONC_1_3
columns.description: Degree Concentration Code 3. Third concentration associated with the degree.

columns.name: SHRDGMR_MAJR_CODE_MINR_2_2
columns.description: Degree Minor Code 2 Secondary. Second minor for the secondary curriculum associated with the degree.

columns.name: SHRDGMR_MAJR_CODE_CONC_2_2
columns.description: Degree Concentration Code 2 Secondary. Second concentration for the secondary curriculum associated with the degree.

columns.name: SHRDGMR_MAJR_CODE_CONC_2_3
columns.description: Degree Concentration Code 3 Secondary. Third concentration for the secondary curriculum associated with the degree.

columns.name: SHRDGMR_TERM_CODE_STUREC
columns.description: Term Code. The term associated with the general student record when degree information is defaulted.

columns.name: SHRDGMR_MAJR_CODE_1_2
columns.description: Degree Major Code 2. Second major associated with the degree.

columns.name: SHRDGMR_MAJR_CODE_2_2
columns.description: Degree Major Code 2 Secondary. Second major for the secondary curriculum associated with the degree.

columns.name: SHRDGMR_CAMP_CODE
columns.description: Degree Campus Code. Campus offering the degree.

columns.name: SHRDGMR_TERM_CODE_GRAD
columns.description: Term in which the student graduates.

columns.name: SHRDGMR_ACYR_CODE
columns.description: Year in which the student graduates.

columns.name: SHRDGMR_FEE_IND
columns.description: This field identifies whether a graduation fee has been assessed.

columns.name: SHRDGMR_FEE_DATE
columns.description: This field identifies the date graduation fee has been assessed.

columns.name: SHRDGMR_AUTHORIZED
columns.description: This field identifies the user and the grad status joined together as one field to identify the person who authorized graduation adds or changes.

columns.name: SHRDGMR_TERM_CODE_COMPLETED
columns.description: Term designated as the term in which graduate work must be completed.

columns.name: SHRDGMR_MAJR_CODE_CONC_121
columns.description: Concentration Code 1 on Major 2, Curriculum 1 Code

columns.name: SHRDGMR_DATA_ORIGIN
columns.description: DATA SOURCE: Source system that created or updated the row

columns.name: SHRDGMR_USER_ID
columns.description: USER ID: The most recent user to create or update a record.

columns.name: SHRDGMR_STSP_KEY_SEQUENCE
columns.description: STUDY PATH SEQUENCE: This field is the key sequence of the study path of the learner curriculum the outcome curriculum originted from.
